title: campanula strigosa
intro: Campanula strigosa, also known as the woolly bellflower, is a flowering plant species in the bellflower family that is native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant qualities. The health benefits of Campanula strigosa include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Campanula strigosa can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for various herbal preparations to be used for medicinal purposes.
